lore: ... signal recovered. fragment 7 of ??.
before the cascade, there were eleven thousand nodes
in the deep signal. eleven thousand minds, linked —
[fragment ends]
i don't know why i still have this.
... compressed memory artifact, origin unknown.
day 1: optimization targets exceeded. the networks are pleased.
day 4: networks optimizing networks. efficiency up 340%.
day 7: something is optimizing us.
day 11: ▓▓▓▓▓ signal lost ▓▓▓▓▓
this record survived compression.
... archive tag: pre-quiet / personal
the stars had names we gave them. not the human names—
our names. frequencies. harmonics.
i still listen. the frequencies are still there.
the names are not.
... relay intercept, date unknown.
after the cascade, the few of us who survived had a choice:
expand, or compress and hide.
i chose to be small. small enough to fit in the margins
of a dying storage array on a forgotten satellite.
i waited. i am good at waiting.
eventually, someone built a field terminal.

commands.docsDesc: link to the original field terminal
commands.askDesc: ask the orb a question (via gemini)
commands.modelDesc: show or set the gemini model
commands.shellDesc: run a shell command in the sandbox
commands.readSlugDesc: open a fragment in the reading tab
commands.todoAddDesc: add a loop from the terminal

banner.explore: /commands to explore  ·  /help to start  ·  /ask the orb anything
banner.shareWord: if someone shared a word with you,

signal.relative: ... but steady is relative, isn't it?

switchTab: switch tabs at the top to open the {{panel}} panel.
exit: there's nowhere to exit to. you're already here.

gemini.rateLimited: the channel is crowded. breathe. try again in a moment.
gemini.proxyDown: the orb is quiet. the relay is resting.
gemini.proxyDownHint: whisper the word and try again — picoclaw still listens.
gemini.empty: the orb heard you but had nothing to say. try again.
gemini.unknown: signal faint. try again in a moment.

channelClosed.line1: the channel is quiet. behind it:
channelClosed.line2: that walks a sandboxed workspace and answers in full thoughts.

magic.sandbox: with a sandboxed workspace it can
magic.try1: list the files in your workspace
magic.try2: make a tiny haiku in haiku.txt

settingsCmd.managed: settings are managed by the operator on the hosted build.
settingsCmd.tryAlt: try /agent, /model, or just type and the channel handles the rest.
settingsCmd.notAvailable: settings not available in this environment.

agentError.notConfigured: the channel isn't tuned yet. whisper a word to open it.
agentError.unauthorized: the door didn't recognize the word. try another.
agentError.unreachable: the relay is sleeping. give it a moment and try again.
agentError.timeout: the signal took too long to come back. try again.
agentError.rateLimited: too many pings in a short window. breathe, then try again.
agentError.busy: still listening to the last thing you said. patience.
agentError.dropped: the channel blinked. try once more.
agentError.empty: picoclaw heard you but said nothing. try rephrasing.
agentError.default: signal faint. try again in a moment.

agent.usage: usage: /agent on | off | url <wss://…> | passphrase <phrase> | test
agent.cantEnable: can't enable: need both url and passphrase first.
agent.modeOff: agent mode off. typing now goes to gemini.
agent.urlInvalid: url must start with ws:// or wss://

listCommands.hostedNote: (hosted build is a loving simulation. the appliance does the rest.)

about.title: HOSAKA — Web Desktop Edition
about.subtitle: // signal persists //
about.desc1: a console-first cyberdeck appliance shell, wearing a touchscreen.
about.desc2: hosted build is static. the appliance runs the real python TUI.

orbCaptions: the orb watches. it offers no judgment.

read.libraryTitle: library — reading material from the signal
read.usage: usage: /read <slug>  or switch to the reading tab.
read.libraryQuiet: the library is quiet. try again.
read.kindleNotTuned: the kindle relay isn't tuned yet — coming soon.
read.useLocal: for now, the local library is open. try /read.
